plan_summary.primary_goal: Launch a financially viable community clay workshop in Nuuk by 2026-09-15 within a 2M DKK Year 1 budget.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests Year 1 viability of the 'Builder's Balance' plan against fixed labor cost, off-peak rental revenue, contingency depletion shocks, and Taster Session conversion.

key_values.label: Year 1 budget envelope
key_values.comment: Total Year 1 capital and operating ceiling that all costs and reserves draw from.
key_values.source_text: Year 1 budget envelope: 2 million DKK — initial capital and operating ceiling.

key_values.label: Contingency reserve fraction
key_values.comment: Share of Year 1 budget ring-fenced as untouchable shock-absorbing reserve.
key_values.source_text: Contingency reserve amount: 15% of the total Year 1 budget.

key_values.label: Drop-in/rental revenue share
key_values.comment: Share of Year 1 revenue that must come from hourly drop-in/rental users at the 165 DKK rate.
key_values.source_text: Revenue mix target: 40% Courses, 35% Memberships, 25% Drop-ins.

key_values.label: Minimum viable hourly rental rate
key_values.comment: Rate non-enrolled users must pay to cover off-peak overhead; speculative if locals reject.
key_values.source_text: Target minimum hourly rental rate for non-enrolled users: 165 DKK/hour.

key_values.label: Taster Session conversion rate
key_values.comment: Share of free Taster attendees expected to become paying members/course students within 90 days.
key_values.source_text: Taster Session outreach will successfully convert attendees to paid memberships or courses at a 15% rate.

key_values.label: Rental revenue shortfall stress
key_values.comment: Midpoint of the 100k-300k DKK Q3 deficit if the high hourly rental model fails.
key_values.source_text: Reliance on high hourly rental rate model failing causes a deficit of 100,000-300,000 DKK by Q3.

key_values.label: Labor-law non-compliance overrun
key_values.comment: Approx. labor liability if contractor model is reclassified to mandated employee benefits/severance.
key_values.source_text: Potential labor liability cost impact: approx. 300,000 DKK — stress test for fixed cost overrun.

key_values.label: Single-kiln failure revenue loss
key_values.comment: Estimated 4-8 week revenue loss if the sole electric kiln fails during the operational year.
key_values.source_text: Single kiln breakdown halts all instructional revenue for 4-8 weeks, costing approximately 200,000 DKK.

derived_questions.question: Does the 15% contingency reserve survive the combined labor-law, rental, and kiln shocks?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Plan explicitly relies on one contingency pool to absorb multiple stress scenarios; if it goes negative, operational agility is lost.

derived_questions.question: Does Taster Session conversion clear the 12.5% minimum required to continue the outreach program?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Below the threshold, Taster budget is reallocated; the program's community-integration premise depends on this margin.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Year 1 absolute revenue target
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Revenue-mix shares (25% drop-ins, 35% memberships, 40% courses) require a revenue denominator distinct from the 2M DKK budget.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bound by total fixed costs plus contingency replenishment; benchmark against comparable Arctic community studios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Monthly fixed labor cost (2 FTE-equivalent)
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives annual labor burden and the gate test against budget; not numerically specified in source.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Estimate from Greenlandic part-time instructor salary norms multiplied by 2 FTE-equivalent.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Off-peak drop-in hours available per year
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Combined with the 165 DKK/hr rate, produces achievable rental revenue to test against the 25% target.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Open studio weekly hours minus scheduled course/membership use, multiplied by operating weeks.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Drop-in utilization rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Share of available off-peak hours actually paid for at 165 DKK; the speculative driver of the 25% drop-in mix.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bound low/base/high using analogous remote-community studio benchmarks; treat as the key sensitivity input.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Minimum acceptable Taster conversion rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Explicit gate at 12.5% below which Taster budget is redirected; needed for conversion-margin calculation.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor at 0.125 per Expert Criticism gate; treat 0.10 as harder Premortem cancellation threshold.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Absolute contingency reserve
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Anchors every downstream shock-absorption gate; the 15% rule is the central financial discipline of the plan.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Bottom-up expected drop-in revenue
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the 165 DKK rate at realistic utilization can plausibly deliver the 25% revenue mix.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Drop-in revenue surplus vs target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Direct test of the highest-risk revenue stream; positive means the speculative rental segment clears its share.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Annual fixed labor cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Largest fixed cost line; required input to budget-margin gate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget margin after labor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Shows the residual budget for fit-out, materials, utilities once labor and contingency are honoured; positive = viable.

unmodelled_gates.label: Greenlandic contractor staffing legality
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Entire 2-FTE-equivalent fixed-cost base assumes contractor classification is lawful; if reclassified, salary and severance obligations would invalidate the budget structure.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Contracts must halt and the plan must pivot to a salaried structure with 20-35% higher fixed labor cost.

unmodelled_gates.label: Nuuk municipal utility variance approval
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: High-draw kiln requires a C1 zoning variance; without it, fit-out cannot complete and the September 2026 readiness date fails.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Fit-out stalls, Q3 peak revenue window is missed, and operational launch slips into low season.

unmodelled_gates.label: Katuaq-area commercial lease secured by 2026-07-01
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: All location-dependent timelines (fit-out, utility, kiln install) anchor to the July lease date; without it the readiness target collapses.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Operational readiness target of 2026-09-15 is threatened and material buffer order is automatically halved.
